bird.name: 黑林鹟
bird.summary: 黑林鹟（學名：Vauriella albigularis，台湾作白喉林鶲）是雀形目鶲科Vauriella屬的鳥類。該物種僅分佈於菲律賓米沙鄢群島中的內格羅斯島、吉馬拉斯島和班乃島上，海拔1000公尺以下的低地或山區森林，是當地的特有鳥種。 該物種由兩位美國動物學家弗蘭克·史威夫…

relations.subject: 黑林鹟
relations.evidence: The natural habitats of the white-throated jungle flycatcher are tropical moist lowland forests and tropical moist montane forests at altitudes of up to 1,350 meters. It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: 黑林鹟
relations.evidence: It is found in tropical moist lowland forests and the lower reaches of tropical moist montane forests typically below 1,000 meters above sea level, but has been recorded at up to 1,350 meters
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: 黑林鹟
relations.evidence: The natural habitats of the white-throated jungle flycatcher are tropical moist lowland forests and tropical moist montane forests at altitudes of up to 1,350 meters. It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
